channel.title: Awus036ac on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Awus036ac on ExitCode0

item.title: AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) driver setup in Kali Linux
item.description: Install Alfa AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) wireless adapter drivers on Kali Linux for monitor mode and packet injection. Aircrack-ng compatible with manual dkms build method.
